title: pholiurus incurvus var. filiformis
intro: Pholiurus incurvus var. filiformis is a type of plant, specifically a grass, that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is also known as Pholiurus filiformis or Filiform Pholiurus, and is native to various parts of the world. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it beneficial for treating various health issues. In herbal preparations, Pholiurus incurvus var. filiformis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory problems, as well as to support immune function.
